 29â†’
 30â†’/**
 31â†’ * Enforce that single line if statements are kept simple. A single line if statement is allowed only when it has at most one else branch.
 32â†’ * Also, the branches of such an if statement may not be wrapped in a block.
 33â†’ */
 34â†’public class IfElseWrappingRule :
 35â†’    StandardRule(
 36â†’        id = "if-else-wrapping",
 37â†’        visitorModifiers = setOf(RunAfterRule(DISCOURAGED_COMMENT_LOCATION_RULE_ID, ONLY_WHEN_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_AND_ENABLED)),
 38â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 39â†’            setOf(
 40â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 41â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 42â†’            ),
 43â†’    ),
 44â†’    Rule.Experimental,
 45â†’    Rule.OfficialCodeStyle {
 46â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 47â†’
 48â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 49â†’        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 50â†’            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51â†’            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52â†’        )
 53â†’    }
 54â†’
 55â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56â†’        node: ASTNode,
 57â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59â†’    ) {
 60â†’        if (node.elementType == IF) {
 61â†’            visitIf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 62â†’        }
 63â†’    }
 64â†’
 65â†’    private fun visitIf(
 66â†’        node: ASTNode,
 67â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 68â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 69â†’    ) {
 70â†’        val outerIf = node.outerIf()
 71â†’        val multilineIf = outerIf.textContains('\n')
 72â†’        val nestedIf = outerIf.isNestedIf()
 73â†’        with(node) {
 74â†’            findChildByType(THEN)
 75â†’                ?.let { visitElement(it, autoCorrect, emit, multilineIf, nestedIf) }
 76â†’            findChildByType(ELSE_KEYWORD)
 77â†’                ?.let { visitElement(it, autoCorrect, emit, multilineIf, nestedIf) }
 78â†’            findChildByType(ELSE)
 79â†’                ?.let { visitElement(it, autoCorrect, emit, multilineIf, nestedIf) }
 80â†’        }
 81â†’    }
 82â†’
 83â†’    private fun visitElement(
 84â†’        node: ASTNode,
 85â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 86â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 87â†’        multilineIf: Boolean,
 88â†’        nestedIf: Boolean,
 89â†’    ) {
 90â†’        if (!multilineIf) {
 91â†’            visitBranchSingleLineIf(node, emit)
 92â†’        }
 93â†’        if (multilineIf || nestedIf) {
 94â†’            visitBranch(node, autoCorrect, emit, multilineIf)
 95â†’        }
 96â†’    }
 97â†’
 98â†’    private fun visitBranchSingleLineIf(
 99â†’        node: ASTNode,
100â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
101â†’    ) {
102â†’        node
103â†’            .findChildByType(BLOCK)
104â†’            ?.let {
105â†’                // The then or else block is part of single line if-statement. To enforce that such statements are readable and
106â†’                // simple, blocks are forbidden entirely in single line if-statements.
107â†’                emit(
108â†’                    node.startOffset,
109â†’                    "A single line if-statement should be kept simple. The '${node.elementType}' may not be wrapped in a block.",
110â†’                    false,
111â†’                )
112â†’            }
113â†’    }
114â†’
115â†’    private fun visitBranch(
116â†’        node: ASTNode,
117â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
118â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
119â†’        multilineIf: Boolean,
120â†’    ) {
121â†’        if (multilineIf) {
122â†’            if (node.elementType == IF && node.prevCodeLeaf()?.elementType == ELSE_KEYWORD ||
123â†’                node.elementType == ELSE && node.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType == IF_KEYWORD ||
124â†’                node.elementType == ELSE_KEYWORD && node.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType == IF_KEYWORD
125â†’            ) {
126â†’                // Allow "else if" on single line
127â†’                return
128â†’            }
129â†’            if (node.elementType == ELSE_KEYWORD && node.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType == LBRACE) {
130â†’                // Allow "else {" on single line
131â†’                return
132â†’            }
133â†’        } else {
134â†’            // Outer if statement is a single line statement
135â†’            if (node.elementType == ELSE && node.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType == IF_KEYWORD) {
136â†’                // Ignore "else if" as it is reported via another message
137â†’                return
138â†’            }
139â†’        }
140â†’
141â†’        with(node.findFirstNodeInBlockToBeIndented() ?: node) {
142â†’            val expectedIndent =
143â†’                node
144â†’                    .treeParent
145â†’                    .indent()
146â†’                    .plus(indentConfig.indent)
147â†’            if (text != expectedIndent) {
148â†’                emit(startOffset, "Expected a newline", true)
149â†’                if (autoCorrect) {
150â†’                    upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedIndent)
151â†’                }
152â†’            }
153â†’        }
154â†’    }
155â†’
156â†’    private fun ASTNode.findFirstNodeInBlockToBeIndented() =
157â†’        findChildByType(BLOCK)
158â†’            ?.children()
159â†’            ?.first {
160â†’                it.elementType != LBRACE &&

164â†’
165â†’    private fun ASTNode.isWhitespaceBeforeComment() = isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() && nextLeaf()?.isPartOfComment() == true
166â†’

168â†’        require(this.elementType == IF)
169â†’        return parents()

171â†’            .lastOrNull()
172â†’            ?: this
173â†’    }
174â†’

176â†’        require(elementType == IF)

178â†’            findChildByType(ELSE)?.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
179â†’    }
180â†’
181â†’    private companion object {
182â†’        val IF_THEN_ELSE_ELEMENT_TYPES =
183â†’            listOf(
184â†’                IF,
185â†’                THEN,
186â†’                ELSE,
187â†’            )
188â†’    }
189â†’}

1â†’package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2â†’
  3â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BINARY_EXPRESSION
  4â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK

 24â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline

 26â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 27â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 28â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 29â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 30â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 31â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 32â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 33â†’
 34â†’/**
 35â†’ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 36â†’ */
 37â†’public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 38â†’    StandardRule(
 39â†’        id = "multiline-if-else",
 40â†’        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 41â†’            setOf(
 42â†’                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 43â†’                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 44â†’            ),
 45â†’    ) {
 46â†’    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 47â†’
 48â†’    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 49â†’        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 50â†’            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 51â†’            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 52â†’        )
 53â†’    }
 54â†’
 55â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 56â†’        node: ASTNode,
 57â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 58â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 59â†’    ) {
 60â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 61â†’            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 62â†’                return
 63â†’            }
 64â†’
 65â†’            // For ELSE containing IF ("else if" pattern), check if the inner IF already has braces
 66â†’            if (node.elementType == ELSE) {
 67â†’                // The inner IF might be a direct child, or wrapped in BINARY_EXPRESSION (for ?: ),
 68â†’                // DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION (for .method()), or other expression wrappers
 69â†’                val innerIfNode = node.findIfNode()
 70â†’                if (innerIfNode != null) {
 71â†’                    // Check if the inner IF's THEN or ELSE has braces
 72â†’                    val innerThenNode = innerIfNode.findChildByType(THEN)
 73â†’                    val innerElseNode = innerIfNode.findChildByType(ELSE)
 74â†’                    val innerThenHasBlock = innerThenNode?.findChildByType(BLOCK) != null
 75â†’                    val innerElseHasBlock = innerElseNode?.findChildByType(BLOCK) != null ||
 76â†’                        innerElseNode?.findChildByType(IF) != null // Handle nested else if with braces
 77â†’                    if (innerThenHasBlock || innerElseHasBlock) {
 78â†’                        // The "else if (...) { }" already has braces, don't wrap it
 79â†’                        return
 80â†’                    }
 81â†’                    // Check if this is a simple single-line "else if" without newline before it
 82â†’                    if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 83â†’                        return
 84â†’                    }
 85â†’                }
 86â†’            }
 87â†’
 88â†’            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 89â†’                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 90â†’                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 91â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 92â†’                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 93â†’                    return
 94â†’                }
 95â†’            }
 96â†’
 97â†’            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 98â†’            if (autoCorrect) {
 99â†’                autocorrect(node)
100â†’            }
101â†’        }
102â†’    }
103â†’
104â†’    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
105â†’        val prevLeaves =
106â†’            node
107â†’                .leaves(forward = false)
108â†’                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
109â†’                .toList()
110â†’                .reversed()
111â†’        val nextLeaves =
112â†’            node
113â†’                .leaves(forward = true)
114â†’                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
115â†’                .toList()
116â†’                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
117â†’
118â†’        prevLeaves
119â†’            .firstOrNull()
120â†’            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
121â†’            ?.let {
122â†’                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
123â†’            }
124â†’        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
125â†’            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
126â†’            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
127â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
128â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
129â†’            prevLeaves
130â†’                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
131â†’                .forEach(::addChild)
132â†’            addChild(previousChild)
133â†’            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
134â†’            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
135â†’            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
136â†’        }
137â†’
138â†’        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
139â†’        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
140â†’            node
141â†’                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
142â†’                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
143â†’        }
144â†’    }
145â†’
146â†’    /**
147â†’     * Finds an IF node that is either a direct child or wrapped in expression nodes like
148â†’     * BINARY_EXPRESSION (for elvis ?:), DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION (for method calls), etc.
149â†’     */
150â†’    private fun ASTNode.findIfNode(): ASTNode? {
151â†’        // First, check for direct IF child
152â†’        findChildByType(IF)?.let { return it }
153â†’
154â†’        // Check for IF wrapped in expression nodes (e.g., `if (...) ?: 0` or `if (...).method()`)
155â†’        val expressionTypes = listOf(
156â†’            BINARY_EXPRESSION,
157â†’            DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION,
158â†’            SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION,
159â†’            POSTFIX_EXPRESSION,
160â†’        )
161â†’        for (child in children()) {
162â†’            if (child.elementType in expressionTypes) {
163â†’                child.findChildByType(IF)?.let { return it }
164â†’            }
165â†’        }
166â†’        return null
167â†’    }
168â†’}
169â†’

171â†’
